tools.name: activate_project
tools.description: Activates the project with the given name or path

tools.name: check_onboarding_performed
tools.description: Checks whether project onboarding was already performed

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Delete a memory file

tools.name: edit_memory
tools.description: Replaces content matching a regular expression in a memory

tools.name: find_file
tools.description: Finds non-gitignored files matching the given file mask within the given relative path

tools.name: find_referencing_symbols
tools.description: Finds references to the symbol at the given name_path

tools.name: find_symbol
tools.description: Retrieves information on all symbols/code entities based on the given name path pattern

tools.name: get_current_config
tools.description: Print the current configuration of the agent, including active and available projects

tools.name: get_symbols_overview
tools.description: Get a high-level understanding of the code symbols in a file

tools.name: initial_instructions
tools.description: Provides the Serena Instructions Manual

tools.name: insert_after_symbol
tools.description: Inserts the given body/content after the end of the definition of the given symbol

tools.name: insert_before_symbol
tools.description: Inserts the given content before the beginning of the definition of the given symbol

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: Lists files and directories in the given directory

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List available memories

tools.name: onboarding
tools.description: Call this tool if onboarding was not performed yet

tools.name: read_memory
tools.description: Read the content of a memory file

tools.name: rename_symbol
tools.description: Renames the symbol with the given name_path to new_name throughout the entire codebase

tools.name: replace_symbol_body
tools.description: Replaces the body of the symbol with the given name_path

tools.name: search_for_pattern
tools.description: Flexible search for arbitrary patterns in the codebase

tools.name: think_about_collected_information
tools.description: Think about collected information

tools.name: think_about_task_adherence
tools.description: Think about task adherence

tools.name: think_about_whether_you_are_done
tools.description: Think about whether you are done

tools.name: write_memory
tools.description: Write a memory file

notes: LSP tools (get_symbols_overview, find_symbol, find_referencing_symbols, search_for_pattern, get_symbols_overview) returned EOF errors during this run. Only get_current_config and list_dir worked successfully. Language server may need warm-up time.
